Class UnitOfWork

Implements the Unit of Work pattern for SQL Server. Manages a single SqlConnection and SqlTransaction shared across all enrolled repositories for the duration of one logical operation.

Inheritance
object
UnitOfWork
Implements
IUnitOfWork
IDisposable
Inherited Members
object.ToString()
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()
Namespace: DAL.Impl.SqlServer
Assembly: DAL.dll
Syntax
public class UnitOfWork : IUnitOfWork, IDisposable
Remarks

Obtain an instance via CreateUnitOfWork(). Usage pattern: 

using (var uow = DalFactory.CreateUnitOfWork())
{
    uow.BeginTransaction();
    // ...operations on uow.*Repository...
    uow.Commit();
}

After Commit() or Rollback(), the instance is spent and cannot be reused; BeginTransaction() will throw ObjectDisposedException. Dispose() will roll back any uncommitted transaction if the using block exits without an explicit commit.

Constructors

View Source

UnitOfWork()

Constructs all repository instances without opening a connection.

public UnitOfWork()

Methods

View Source

BeginTransaction()

Opens the shared connection and begins a database transaction, injecting both into all repositories.

Declaration
public void BeginTransaction()
Exceptions
Type Condition
ObjectDisposedException

Thrown if the instance has already been disposed or spent.
InvalidOperationException

Thrown if a transaction is already active on this instance.
View Source

Commit()

Commits the active transaction and closes the shared connection.

Declaration
public void Commit()
Exceptions
Type Condition
InvalidOperationException

Thrown if no transaction is active.
View Source

Dispose()

Rolls back any uncommitted transaction and releases all resources. Called automatically at the end of a using block.

Declaration
public void Dispose()
View Source

Rollback()

Rolls back the active transaction and closes the shared connection. Safe to call even when no transaction is active (no-op in that case).

Declaration
public void Rollback()

Implements

IUnitOfWork
IDisposable
